external.title: What does America's 250th anniversary mean to Native Americans?

record.text: 待って天幕のジャードゥーガル観ようと思ってたのに今日だったの知らなかった……ネトフリでも観られるっぽいよかった💦
Read the part about throwing off the old guards if they do not work, for a new government. It doesn't say anything about waiting for the next election to do this. We should do this now!

#HowToTellAiToShutUp!  

These days I was googling something about a band and weirdly ended up to read Radio TFSC started an #IndieRebellion 😂 As if I would have that power... But hey so lets keep going with the rebellion! 
👇

Going under a band's event post and saying, "26,000 people sought asylum from Country X to Country Y, so don't visit that country," while trying to punish the remaining 86 million people is about as childish as it gets.

The government you're trying to get back at is one thing, but the people you're trying to punish may never have voted for that government in the first place. What's more, many of the people making these comments don't

even know the country's election results, political landscape, or how diverse its society is.Reducing an entire nation to its current government based on a few headlines is nothing more than prejudice. It's a perfect example of having a brain but not using it.

V souvislosti s politikou v hlavním městě se často říká, že být primátorem je prestižnější než mít některé z malých ministerstev. Nejde přitom o takovou nadsázku, v Praze se často hraje skutečně velká politika, a to mimo dohled médií. Jaká je situace necelých 100 dní před volbami?
Makes you wonder what is wrong with the other 11%. Maybe those are the ones in the files??
